summary: teof bus_status wrapper now delegates to tools.agent.bus_status.run_with_namespace and supports the existing parser options (including --events-path for tests).
bus_status.load_events gained an optional path override so the CLI can read sandboxed event logs; regression tests cover JSON + summary output via teof.bootloader.
Docs (onboarding, parallel-codex, workflow, operator atlas, bus README, queue brief) now reference the teof alias while keeping the legacy module path noted for compatibility.
